name: QcX Gold Corp.
description: QcX Gold Corp. is a Canada-based junior mining company focused on the exploration and development of gold and volcanogenic massive sulphide (VMS) style mineralization. The company primarily operates within mining-friendly jurisdictions in Quebec and Ontario, Canada. QcX Gold is dedicated to identifying and advancing high-potential mineral properties, leveraging its expertise in geological exploration to build value for shareholders. By targeting regions with proven geological potential, the company aims to discover and delineate significant mineral resources, contributing to the growth of the Canadian mining sector through strategic exploration initiatives and disciplined project management.
